plugin.name: com.opencellsoft.plugins:opencell-maven-plugin
plugin.description: The REST Request Maven Plugin is meant to provide an easy way to convert a java file into xml files and to interface to REST services via the POST operation to send data files to the REST URL and retrieve (and store) the results.

parameter.name: inputDir
parameter.description: A directory, relative to the project root path, containing the files to be converted to Postman file

parameter.name: javaFile
parameter.description: A full, relative to the project root, path of a single file to be converted to Postman file

parameter.name: postmanFilename
parameter.description: A postman filename to be generated

mojo.description: Convert a java file to opencell scripts xml format Make REST request, sending file contents and saving results to a file if needed. This plugin is meant to provide an easy way to interface to REST services via the POST operation to send data files to the REST URL and retrieve (and store) the results.

parameter.name: endpoint
parameter.description: A URL path to the base of the REST request resource. This URL path is the base path, and can be used with multiple instances (executions) in combination with the resource element to specify different URL resources with a common base URL.

parameter.name: fileMapper
parameter.description:
A FileMapper object to generate output filenames. Provide a FileMapper to generate the output filename which is used to store the REST query results.
Unlike the fileset process, an individual fileMapper element will be used *instead of* the fileMappers list. If multiple fileMapper elements must be applied to each file, then do not specify the individual fileMapper element.

parameter.name: fileMappers
parameter.description: A list of fileMapper rules to generate output filenames.

parameter.name: fileset
parameter.description:
A FileSet rule to select files to send in the REST request. The fileset will be used to gather all the files to be submitted in the REST request. One REST request will be made per file.
Internally, this element will be added to the list of filesets, so it will be processed in addition to the list of filesets

parameter.name: filesets
parameter.description: A list of FileSet rules to select files and directories. This list of fileset elements will be used to gather all the files to be submitted in the REST request. One REST request will be made per file.

parameter.name: headers
parameter.description: A map of query headers to add to the REST request. The headers element will provide a way to add multiple header elements to the final REST request.

parameter.name: inputDir
parameter.description: A directory, relative to the project root path, containing the files to be send via REST API

parameter.name: javaFile
parameter.description: A full, relative to the project root, path of a single file to be send via REST API

parameter.name: method
parameter.description:
The method to use for the REST request. The REST request method can be configured via the method tag. Currently only the POST and GET requests are fully tested and supported. Other methods requiring data upload (PUT, PATCH) should be supported identically to the POST request, but have not been tested.
If GET is used, the code will upload a file if the fileset is defined when making the GET request.
Defaults to POST

parameter.name: outputDir
parameter.description: Path where REST query request and result files are stored in case saveResponse flag is turned on. Defaults to ${project.build.directory}/rest

parameter.name: outputFilename
parameter.description: Filename where REST GET query result files are stored, if no fileset is defined. Defaults to rest.file

parameter.name: queryParams
parameter.description: A map of query parameters to add to the REST request URL. The queryParams element will provide a way to add multiple query params to the final REST URL.

parameter.name: requestType
parameter.description:
The type of the data sent by the REST request. The data type of the REST request data. Default MediaType.TEXT_PLAIN_TYPE
If this is specified, use the elements for MediaType class:
<requestType> <type>application</type> <subtype>json</subtype> </requestType>

parameter.name: resource
parameter.description:
A resource path added to the endpoint URL to access the REST resource. The resource path will be concatenated onto the endpoint URL to create the full resource path.
Query parameters can be added to the URL resource but the preference is to use the queryParams map to add parameters to the URL.

parameter.name: responseType
parameter.description:
The type of the data returned by the REST request. The expected data type of the REST response. Default MediaType.APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM_TYPE
See requestType for example of usage.

parameter.name: saveResponse
parameter.description: A boolean that indicate if save response or not default value is false

mojo.description: Display help information on opencell-maven-plugin. Call mvn opencell:help -Ddetail=true -Dgoal=<goal-name> to display parameter details.

parameter.name: detail
parameter.description: If true, display all settable properties for each goal.

parameter.name: goal
parameter.description: The name of the goal for which to show help. If unspecified, all goals will be displayed.

parameter.name: indentSize
parameter.description: The number of spaces per indentation level, should be positive.

parameter.name: lineLength
parameter.description: The maximum length of a display line, should be positive.
